历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 4299 → 15225 (abnormal gap) → 11927 → 9046 → 9528. In 2022, there was an abnormally high value due to a gap, which fell back to 11927 in 2023, then significantly rebounded to 9046 in 2024, and slightly shifted back to 9528 in 2025. In the past two years, it has fluctuated in the 9000–9600 range, with a baseline of about 9528 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province for Physics Category was 19 in 2024, 19 in 2025, and remains 19 in 2026, unchanged for three consecutive years, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin Medical University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 60th, with stable rankings between 55–67 in recent years. It is a top-tier medical institution with a solid foundation. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no major negative or positive public opinion incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 78th, rated as 'average', indicating low attention on short video platforms and no abnormal signals in application popularity. There is no historical record of enrollment gaps.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors generally maintain high social popularity, with competitive applications for long-term programs such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Jilin Province is approximately 110,868, a slight decrease of about 0.56% from 111,492 in 2025. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 72%, the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in 2026 is about 79,900, a decrease of about 521 from 80,421 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Tianjin Medical University is located in Tianjin, which is in the northern region like Jilin, with moderate regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings in the 9000–9600 range, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, and the slight decrease of about 0.65% in the total number of Physics Category examinees in Jilin Province, which slightly eases competition, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward based on the 2025 baseline of 9528. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9498, with a range of 8998–9998.
